top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gold coin salesmen orchestrated plot to set up rival, court finds
top_signals.summary: Ex-employees of Hattons of London took confidential customer data amid a booming market for bullion
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
top_signals.summary: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.

top_signals.title: Fire at Tokyo elementary school suspected to be accidental
top_signals.summary: The fire is believed to have started on the fourth floor of the school building.
